'''''Disorver''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of the fleet that patrolled the [[Killaniri system/Legends|Killaniri system]].
